scope: strict evidence binding for all experiment event types
factual claim source binding to external registry and event evidence
derived maturity precedence over an untrusted raw enum

independent_checks.result: All four experiment event types rejected references absent from the strict evidence registry.
A registered factual source absent from event.evidence_refs was rejected.
The derived development profile overrode an untrusted raw advanced enum.
An identical retry after orchestrator reinstantiation was a noop with unchanged revision and ledger bytes.

blockers_found_during_review.summary: Experiment event evidence could bypass strict external registry resolution.
A factual claim source was not bound to both the external registry and its event evidence list.

nonblockers.summary: QA ran before the final control-workspace commit; the phase seal and recovery bundle must anchor the validated filesystem state.
nonblockers.disposition: Resolve as the final P5 checkpoint operation.
